=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:27-5:46) TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
  Fix 0: "Disable cryptoRandomUUID for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable cryptoRandomUUID for entire file"

  Fix 1: "Disable cryptoRandomUUID for entire file"
